title: Passable Leaves
body:
## 📖 About
Now players and mobs will fall through leaves when standing on them or entering from the side.

### Features:
- Each block at the feet or head increases slowdown by 20% and reduces gravity by 12.5%. With two blocks, the total slowdown becomes 40% and reduces gravity by 25%.
- Chainmail boots let players/mobs walk on leaves. Sneak to fall through (like powder snow).

![Chainmail boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8xG8UA5T/images/625e59a7fe93dbc85885028aa01ce8a00f88b2db.png)

#
## ▶️ Demonstration

#
## ⛔️ Known Issues
These issues cannot be fixed or are only partially fixed
- Only the player's vanilla hitbox size is used for checks.
- A leaves block above the head remains solid.

#
## 🔗 Links
You can leave a comment on the PMC page!

Russian discord server of datapackers / Русский дискорд сервер датапакеров

Если вы датапакер, ищите адекватной помощи, полезных ресурсов и возможности поделиться проектами, то вам на [СвинСоюз: Датапаки](https://discord.gg/YNsUzsxyu5)!
Это сервер-ответвление от изначального заброшенного сервера ZeroCaty "СвинСоюз". Сейчас мы не имеем к нему никакого отношения.

[![SvinSoyuz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afb7cdcc943fceaa9f901c538ccfe15ea357f383.png)](https://discord.gg/YNsUzsxyu5)
